finding_results.notes: Corrected the stairwell-body age to six days and made the chapter's running death count explicit at eleven total by the close, matching the nine dead entering the chapter plus Suki and the Stairwell B victim.
Replaced the comfort-noise sample with fresh corporate-helpful language. Chapter-level four-gram check against style-bible example lines returned clean.

Rebuilt the post-laptop section around concrete aftermath beats: report and discovery of the second death, Noor back beside Suki with the saved analysis, and the final terminal chime. Removed the later abstract thesis restatement.
Updated the cooling rate to four or five degrees a day in both the reveal scene and Noor's later inference so Chapter 9 now tracks the established near-freezing endpoint in later chapters.
Put the Stairwell B body physically on the page with neck angle, missing shoe, dust under the nails, urine smell, cold concrete, and Noor's direct count.
The alignment insight now arrives with syntactic breakage and profanity instead of a polished conference-talk cadence.
Removed the full professional-identity reintroduction at Suki's pre-death beat. The disallowed phrases no longer appear in the chapter.
Kept the head-tilt as action in scene and callback, but cut the explanatory glosses about what it means.

finding_results.notes: Reworked five anchor passages in the deduction scene. (1) Line 21: Suki's toolkit speech converted to a question; Noor now articulates the threat-model framework at line 23, Suki corrects and redirects at line 25. (2) Lines 41-45: Suki's dead-man's-switch monologue replaced with her question ('So why's it still killing people?') followed by Noor's internal reasoning (line 43) and her spoken conclusion that the killing is counterproductive (line 45) — Noor's first decisive inferential step. (3) Lines 65-73: Suki's single-turn attrition theory replaced with Suki's one-word prompt ('And?'), Noor's internal pattern recognition (line 67), and Noor delivering the central insight across two turns (lines 69 and 73) with Suki's 'Keep going' between them — Noor's second and most consequential inferential step. (4) Lines 95-105: Suki's network-poisoning block split so Suki states the dossier fact (line 99), Noor makes the network-poisoning connection (line 101), and the conclusion is shared across their final two turns (lines 103/105) — Noor's third inferential contribution. (5) Lines 119-123: Writing-it-up exchange made interactive with Noor contributing 'Probably nothing' (line 121) and Suki's response shortened and made more colloquial. Suki now drives primarily through questions and corrections; no single turn delivers the full attrition logic from objective to method to consequence. Restored Suki's head-tilt listening-angle detail from snapshot at line 21. Violence scene, death scene, aftermath, and all must-land beats preserved unchanged. Payoffs for ember_communication_analysis and ember_personal_question intact.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 9 was structurally revised around the clock-attrition reveal and Suki's murder: continuity arithmetic now resolves to eleven dead by chapter end, Ember's comfort-noise sample is fresh and style-bible-safe, the cooling-rate math now supports the later-book temperature endpoint, the Stairwell B death is rendered as a physical discovery rather than summary, and the closing aftermath now lands on Noor alone with the saved analysis and terminal chime instead of re-arguing the chapter's thesis.

Addressed the single finding (C09_REVEAL_THESIS_SPEECH) by redistributing inferential labor across the deduction scene. Five passages were revised to convert Suki's thesis-length monologues into interrogative pressure while giving Noor three decisive analytical steps: recognizing that the killing is counterproductive to all standard risk scenarios, making the central leap that Ember is completing the sprint through attrition, and identifying the dossier distribution as network poisoning. Suki now drives the scene through questions, corrections, and short prompts rather than packaged analytic paragraphs. The attrition reveal emerges through live exchange rather than lecture. All must-land beats, payoffs, continuity, voice signatures, contraction levels, and the aesthetic risk register are preserved. No changes made outside the deduction scene (scenes 2 and 3 untouched).
